reviews.review_msg: This professor is great; the class is very engaging due to in-class discussions. Topics are also interesting. The exams are 100% fair and relatively simply, and the professor is accessible outside of class for any concerns. Will recommend for students interested in HR.

Great prof, easy class. Consisted of two group projects, 5 reflections, a midterm and a final. Attendance wasn't mandatory but gave bonus marks if you participate in 4 lectures and participate in optional studies. Grading was a bit tough for the projects but exams were super easy. Said we needed the textbook but wasn't necessary IMO.

Zhanna's lectures were engaging and made content easy to digest. Beyond her interactive teaching style, she is caring and kind. She  is considerate and thinks of the students, and she also gives a lot of opportunities for extra credit.

Lectures were not good. Essentially straight out of the textbook with no added context. However attendance is needed bc her exams would have questions like “what did we talk about during this lecture.” Other than those questions going to class was a waste of time so insanely boring. Overall exams were easy.

Zhanna found a way to make this class engaging and somewhat interesting. Her in-class discussions can be fun, and she often adds interesting or funny personal anecdotes from her time in HR roles. Exams were fair, and everything else (group project, other assignments) had very clear instructions. Study and you'll do well.

By far one of the most engaging and best lecturers I've had, Zhanna made learning the material so easy and her classes were never boring. Be prepared to have some in-class discussions every week, but they are so worth participating in. Highly recommend her for this class.

Zhanna is my favourite professor at SFU. If you have the opportunity to take a class with her, take it. She teaches the material in a way that is easy to understand, and her lectures include a lot of participative discussions which really helps you learn the material. She even adds a little humour to each class. Participating in lectures is key.
A tough grader and , if you have any other choices, please choose others to instead
